title: CLI/LSP integration, formatter, and test harness hardening

source.subject: Test harness, formatter, CLI/LSP integration, and CI hardening.

body:
## Outcome

Test harness, formatter, CLI/LSP integration, and CI hardening.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **Platform-spec cutover** (`v02-platform-spec-cutover`).
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`98aa6bc`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/98aa6bc) — Test harness, formatter, CLI/LSP integration, and CI hardening.
